title: quercus ochracea
intro: Quercus ochracea, also known as the Island Live Oak or Island Scrub Live Oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the Quercus genus and is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus ochracea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus ochracea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
